sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24276" key="deuth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δευτήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n24276.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">kettle, cauldron,</tr_> Demiopr. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:105" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.105</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δεῦμα.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
